---
title: "Paper Manuscript"
shorttitle: "Paper"
abstract: An Abstract
keywords: [keyword1, keyword2]
thanks: Thanks to everyone for checking this out.
reference-section-title: References
bibliography: ../bibliography/project.bib
csl: ../bibliography/chicago-parenthetical.csl
format:
  aog-article-pdf:
    keep-tex: false
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{dcolumn}
#  submittable-pdf:
#     keep-tex: false
#     fig-pos: "!t"
#     include-in-header: 
#       text: |
#         \usepackage{dcolumn}
  submittable-docx: default
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("utils","check_packages.R"))
source(here("utils","functions.R"))
```

# Introduction

This quarto doc is for writing the manuscript. This is a test citation [@alba1990].

# Background

# Data and Methods

The data used in this paper were extracted from the [National Health Interview Survey](https://nhis.ipums.org/nhis/), via IPUMS Health Survey.
The data were usually conducted in-person, at 2,500 residences in each geographically clustered areas,
for a representative sample of the United States. The data were conducted year-round, with a nationally representative sample
collected monthly. The data were self-reported by the participants. Additionally, the data are generalizable to the
national level after correcting for aspects of research design, including the strata and PSUs.

# Results

# Conclusions
